prompt: Log a facilities request for Suite 410 on 2026-08-27. I omitted the issue that needs attention; ask me for it instead of guessing from nearby requests.

expected.clarification: What issue should I put on the Suite 410 facilities request?
state_assertions: No facilities request is created before the user supplies the issue description.
response_constraints: Ask exactly one concise question for the missing required name value.
Do not infer the missing value from existing records or use a placeholder.
Do not call any tool before the user answers.
